nasb.text: Do horses run on rocks? Or does one plow them with oxen? Yet you have turned justice into poison And the fruit of righteousness into wormwood,

esv.text: Do horses run on rocks? Does one plow there with oxen? But you have turned justice into poison and the fruit of righteousness into wormwood—

cnv.text: 馬會在懸崖奔馳嗎？ 人會用牛耙海嗎？ 但你使公正變為毒草， 使公義的果子轉為苦堇。

ccb.text: 马能在悬崖上奔驰吗？ 牛能在海中耕作吗？ 你们却使公正沦为毒药， 使公义之果变成苦艾。
